name: bugate
description: Agentic QA governance kit / SDTD gate engine: pre-code gates, auditable lifecycle-role handoffs, hash-linked evidence, strict Memory transitions, dual-runtime peer bridges, and physical write guards. Inert until the project carries a committed bugate.config.yaml.

interface.shortDescription: Govern AI test development with auditable gates.
interface.longDescription: BUGate packages SUT-neutral Agentic QA governance: shared skills, fail-closed hooks, stdlib gate scripts, auditable designer/implementer/reviewer transitions, peer-review adapters, and Memory-backed evidence for imported SUT automation test repos.
defaultPrompt: Use BUGate to govern this SUT test workspace: recall the active profile, build the pre-code artifacts, and enforce any configured role handoff before test implementation.
Use BUGate full check to verify this checkout's skills, hooks, gates, optional runtimes, and memory-bus wiring.
